summary: Testing of product edit features: Backend APIs work correctly, but the Frontend ProductDetailDialog with 3 tabs is NOT integrated into any page

critical.issue: The ProductDetailDialog component with 3 tabs (Info, Editar, Imágenes) exists at /app/frontend/src/components/dialogs/ProductDetailDialog.jsx but is NOT imported or used anywhere in the application. Neither Products.jsx nor SupplierDetail.jsx imports this component.

integration_issues.issue: Products.jsx uses its own inline Dialog (not ProductDetailDialog) for viewing unified products. SupplierDetail.jsx also uses its own inline Dialog. Neither uses the new ProductDetailDialog component with tabs.

backend_tests_passed: PUT /api/products/{product_id} - Updates multiple fields at once correctly
GET /api/products/{product_id} - Returns all new fields (short_description, long_description, gallery_images)
Auth required for all product endpoints (returns 403 without auth)
action_items: CRITICAL: Import and use ProductDetailDialog from /app/frontend/src/components/dialogs/ProductDetailDialog.jsx in either Products.jsx or SupplierDetail.jsx (or both)
Replace the inline Dialog in SupplierDetail.jsx (lines 1064-1140) with the ProductDetailDialog component
Alternatively, replace the inline Dialog in Products.jsx to use ProductDetailDialog
Verify ProductDetailDialog opens when clicking on a product and shows the 3 tabs: Info/Proveedores, Editar, Imágenes
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetailDialog component is complete and well-implemented with all required tabs and fields
Backend endpoints for product update (PUT), image upload (POST), and gallery delete (DELETE) all work correctly
The component has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Issue is purely frontend integration - component exists but is not imported anywhere
seed_data_creation: Created test product TEST_product_0f9dd330 with supplier TEST_supplier_ba8e2917 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API for product editing works 100%. The ProductDetailDialog component with 3 tabs exists but is NOT used in any page. Main agent needs to import and integrate ProductDetailDialog into Products.jsx or SupplierDetail.jsx. After fix, test by clicking view button on a product and checking if dialog shows 3 tabs: Info/Proveedores, Editar, Imágenes. Test that editing fields and uploading images works through the UI.

root_cause_analysis.issue: ProductDetailDialog component with 3 tabs not visible in the app
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The ProductDetailDialog component was created at /app/frontend/src/components/dialogs/ProductDetailDialog.jsx but was never imported or used in any page component. Products.jsx (line 584) and SupplierDetail.jsx (line 1064) both use their own inline Dialog components instead.
reproduction_steps: 2. Click on view (eye icon) button for a product
3. Observe: A basic 'Detalle del Producto' dialog opens without tabs
4. Expected: ProductDetailDialog with 3 tabs (Info, Editar, Imágenes) should open
root_cause_analysis.fix_suggestion: Import ProductDetailDialog in SupplierDetail.jsx or Products.jsx and replace the inline Dialog with: <ProductDetailDialog open={showDetailDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDetailDialog} product={selectedProduct} onProductUpdate={fetchProducts} />
